rationale: The cited paper appears conceptually aligned with the citing paper’s mechanism tests: both focus on schema/congruity effects in evaluations of innovative product designs, and the citing paper explicitly models schema congruity and risk as adoption drivers. Given this overlap in focal constructs and the cited paper’s role as a boundary-condition/process account for incongruity judgments, it is plausible this is more than a passing mention and merits full relation review.
